flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cosumnes River College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cosumnes River College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.2k → $12.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cosumnes River College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cosumnes River College rose 44% between 2007 and 2010 (9.7k → 14.0k).
